questions.text: For cost and security, the team must run event-driven functions without servers. What is the recommended approach? run event-driven functions without servers.
questions.explanation: Lambda executes code in response to events.

questions.text: A hybrid environment must support a goal to create REST APIs for microservices without changing application code. What should you implement? create REST APIs for microservices.
questions.explanation: API Gateway manages HTTP APIs and integrations.

questions.text: A company needs to store objects for serverless web assets. Which option meets the requirement with the LEAST implementation effort? store objects for serverless web assets.
questions.explanation: S3 hosts static assets and user uploads.

questions.text: While troubleshooting latency, engineers determine they must send asynchronous messages between services. Which action is appropriate? send asynchronous messages between services.
questions.explanation: SQS decouples producers and consumers.

questions.text: Operations reports a need to fan out events to multiple subscribers. What is the MOST operationally efficient solution? fan out events to multiple subscribers.
questions.explanation: SNS is a pub/sub messaging service.

questions.text: For cost and security, the team must orchestrate multi-step serverless workflows. What is the recommended approach? orchestrate multi-step serverless workflows.
questions.explanation: Step Functions coordinates Lambda and other services.

questions.text: A company needs to authenticate users for web and mobile apps. Which option meets the requirement with the LEAST implementation effort? authenticate users for web and mobile apps.
questions.explanation: Cognito provides user pools and identity pools.

questions.text: During peak traffic, the platform team must cache DynamoDB reads for lower latency. What should they do FIRST? cache DynamoDB reads for lower latency.

options.text: Amazon ElastiCache for all DynamoDB writes

questions.explanation: DAX is an in-memory cache for DynamoDB.

questions.text: During peak traffic, the platform team must run containers without managing EC2 for tasks. What should they do FIRST? run containers without managing EC2 for tasks.
questions.explanation: Fargate runs containers serverlessly.

questions.text: While troubleshooting latency, engineers determine they must version and deploy application packages. Which action is appropriate? version and deploy application packages.
questions.explanation: CodeDeploy automates deployments to compute.

questions.text: After a design review, leadership requires the team to store API keys and rotate them automatically. Which approach is MOST reliable? store API keys and rotate them automatically.
questions.explanation: Secrets Manager rotates secrets securely.

questions.explanation: KMS encrypts secrets at rest for Lambda.
